title: Narrow AI Path

steps.title: Goal Formulation
steps.summary: Goal Formulation belongs to the Reinforcement Learning area of AI/ML, within Narrow AI. It sits inside Reinforcement Learning / Narrow AI. Compare it with Goal Revision and Goal Reasoner. It opens into Goal Formulation Agent.
steps.whyIncluded: Start here to anchor the vocabulary and core intuition for this area.

steps.title: Goal Revision

steps.whyIncluded: Use this after the foundations to connect patterns, variants, and system behavior.

steps.title: Goal Reasoner
steps.summary: Goal Reasoner belongs to the Reinforcement Learning area of AI/ML, within Narrow AI. It sits inside Reinforcement Learning / Narrow AI. Compare it with Goal Revision and Goal Formulation.
